security.csp: default-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://useobol.pages.dev https://useobol.com http://localhost:5173; img-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Obol desktop widget — mood + spend at a glance
bundle.longDescription: Lightweight desktop widget that displays your Obol usage mood meter, monthly spend, today's spend, and a 14-day trend. Authenticates via a personal access token; lives in your system tray and updates every 30 minutes.
